tasks.title: Outline AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator Prompt Pack
tasks.details: Structure the content for a prompt pack designed to generate social media posts using AI. This should include sections for different post types (e.g., engagement, promotion, educational), tone variations, and platform optimizations.
tasks.reason: Pivoting from template pack to prompt pack for AI-Powered Social Media Content, as this is a more direct application of AI capabilities for content generation.

tasks.title: Brainstorm micro-product ideas for prompt packs

tasks.reason: Pivoting from the template pack to a more focused micro-product idea based on prompt generation, as per previous agent feedback.
